projects.title: AI-Powered Communication Routing & Spam Classifier
description: Architected an end-to-end NLP text processing pipeline to clean, tokenize, and vectorize text datasets using TF-IDF feature extraction.
Trained and validated a Random Forest Classifier to distinguish system communications from risks with rigorous testing metrics.
Deployed a live, real-time inferencing web interface using Streamlit to process message payloads with minimal latency.

projects.title: Production-Style Patient Data Engine
description: Developed a high-performance RESTful API using FastAPI to process, track, and modify relational patient health metrics.
Enforced data schema validation, custom exceptions, and structured response parsing using Pydantic Data Models.
Designed modular backend components utilizing modular APIRouter splits and structured lifecycle file system operations.

projects.title: Predictive Medical Analysis & Classification Pipelines
description: Engineered binary classification pipelines leveraging PyCaret and KNN algorithms to accurately detect anomalies in health datasets.
Handled feature scaling, outlier elimination, and stratified splitting workflows to protect backend tracking from data leakage.
Evaluated pipeline performance using industry-standard precision, recall, F1-scores, and ROC curves.

description: Implemented Linear Regression from scratch using Python to strengthen understanding of core machine learning concepts, including cost function computation and parameter optimization

Designed modular and scalable backend components following best practices in API development

projects.name: Affordable Medicines for All
projects.description: A social awareness magazine with the tagline 'Equal Access, Health for Every Life', aiming to educate society about the importance of medicine affordability, highlight its global impact, and promote solutions that ensure healthcare access for all. Its mission is to raise awareness about medicine affordability, reduce healthcare inequality, and promote equitable access to essential medicines.

projects.name: Affordable Medicines for All – Equal Access, Health for Every Life (Social Awareness Magazine Proposal)
projects.description: Proposed a social awareness magazine to educate society about the importance of medicine affordability, highlight its global impact, and promote solutions for healthcare access. The vision is 'A world where essential medicines are affordable, accessible, and available to every individual regardless of income.' The mission is to raise awareness about medicine affordability, reduce healthcare inequality, and promote equitable access to essential medicines. Objectives include creating awareness about affordable medicines, educating on global healthcare disparities, highlighting causes of high costs, promoting policies for accessibility, and encouraging informed healthcare decisions. The project's scope involves spreading awareness, serving as an educational resource, organizing campaigns, collaborating with professionals and policymakers, promoting safe medicine use, and supporting community engagement. Implementation includes research and planning, content development, magazine design and publication (digital and print), awareness campaigns, community engagement, collaboration and support, and use of digital platforms.

name: Shaurya Mishra
projects: Social Awareness Magazine: Affordable Medicines for All

projects.title: Social Awareness Magazine: Affordable Medicines for All
projects.description: Proposal for a social awareness magazine aiming to educate society about the importance of medicine affordability, highlight its global impact, and promote solutions that ensure healthcare access for all. The magazine seeks to raise awareness about medicine affordability, reduce healthcare inequality, and promote equitable access to essential medicines by educating communities, encouraging responsible healthcare policies, and supporting initiatives for accessible life-saving treatments.
responsibilities: Conduct research on global medicine accessibility, healthcare inequality, and affordability challenges, identifying key issues such as high costs, distribution barriers, and policy limitations.
Prepare informative articles, statistics, case studies, and awareness messages explaining the causes and consequences of inaccessible medicines in simple and clear language.
Design the magazine in an engaging and reader-friendly format and publish both digital and print versions to maximize reach.
Distribute the magazine in educational institutions and community centers, conducting interactive sessions discussing healthcare access and affordability.
Encourage discussions among students, families, and community members regarding health equity and responsible medicine use.
Partner with healthcare professionals, NGOs, and policymakers to provide credible information and guidance.
Promote awareness through social media campaigns, educational content, and online resources.

projects.title: Affordable Medicines for All – Equal Access, Health for Every Life
projects.description: A proposal for a social awareness magazine designed to educate society about the importance of medicine affordability, highlight its global impact, and promote solutions that ensure healthcare access for all. The project involves research and planning, content development, magazine design and publication (digital and print), awareness campaigns, community engagement, collaboration with healthcare professionals and policymakers, and the use of digital platforms to raise awareness, reduce healthcare inequality, and promote equitable access to essential medicines.
